violations.text: Refrigerator in room#4 was not in good repair.(inadequate ambient temperatures).PIC removed TCS foods to colder refrigeration unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023

Various dairy products was observed held at (47-50)degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of products. Establishment not allowed to store TCS foods in refrigerators in classrooms 3 & 4 until repaired. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023
Refrigerators located in the classrooms 3 and 4 area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures). New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
